allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('main:', d.get\('main',''\)\); print\('exports:', json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in list\(d.get\('exports',{}\).items\(\)\)[:10]}, indent=2\)\)")
